name: Baldur's gate 3 rp
description:
This will begin slightly different from the main game as to introduce characters earlier. Namely, you can gather most of the the starting party aboard the ship.

You have been kidnapped along with others by a mindflayer hive and are now being held captive on their flying ship the nautaloid. You and the other prisioners have been infected with a illithid tadpole and can now sense that you share a bond with eachother.

As you break out of your pod and navigate the ship you realize it has been attacked and now is the perfect time to escape. And potentially gather others to help you before the ship crashlands
creator: Allsk
